exercises.title: A: Word Formation
exercises.instructions: Use the word given in capitals to form a word that fits in the space.
exercises.studentInstruction: Use the word given in capitals to form a word that fits in the space.

items.sentence: The Wildlife Conservation Trust is an organisation (1) ...... (DEPEND) of state funding, dedicated to protecting endangered species and their natural habitats.

explanationContent.whyCorrect: The clue is not dependent, so the correct answer is "independent".

wrongOptions.1: The bare infinitive (1) is not conjugated — adjust tense and person to fit the sentence.

explanationContent.commonMistake: Check subject–verb agreement, tense, and whether the verb form matches the time clues in the sentence.
explanationContent.usefulTip: Read the subject and any time expressions before you conjugate — they decide tense and agreement.
explanationContent.grammarFocus: Conjugate (1) to match the subject and the time clues in the sentence.

explanationContent.grammarFocus: Present perfect (have/has + past participle) links past actions to now or unfinished time.

exercises.title: F: Verb Forms
exercises.instructions: Complete using the correct form of the verbs in brackets.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete using the correct form of the verbs in brackets.

items.sentence: It’s high time ...... (we / redecorate) the office.

explanationContent.whyCorrect: The clue is it's high time + past, so the correct answer is "we redecorated".

wrongOptions.we / redecorate: The bare infinitive (we / redecorate) is not conjugated — adjust tense and person to fit the sentence.

explanationContent.commonMistake: Check subject–verb agreement, tense, and whether the verb form matches the time clues in the sentence.
explanationContent.usefulTip: Read the subject and any time expressions before you conjugate — they decide tense and agreement.
explanationContent.grammarFocus: Conjugate (we / redecorate) to match the subject and the time clues in the sentence.

items.sentence: ...... (I / take) your advice earlier, I wouldn’t be in this difficult position now.

explanationContent.whyCorrect: The clue is inverted third conditional, so the correct answer is "Had I taken".

wrongOptions.i taken: Without had, the earlier-past relationship is lost.
wrongOptions.i / take: The bare infinitive (i / take) is not conjugated — adjust tense and person to fit the sentence.

explanationContent.commonMistake: Past simple only shows one past event — use had + past participle for the earlier action.
explanationContent.usefulTip: Name the conditional type first — that tells you which verb forms belong in each clause.
explanationContent.grammarFocus: Third conditional: if + past perfect, would have + past participle — an unreal past result.

items.sentence: I do wish ...... (you / mention) it to Sandra, but you have so it’s too late now.

explanationContent.whyCorrect: The clue is wish about past, so the correct answer is "you hadn't mentioned".

wrongOptions.you / mention: The bare infinitive (you / mention) is not conjugated — adjust tense and person to fit the sentence.

explanationContent.usefulTip: Read the subject and any time expressions before you conjugate — they decide tense and agreement.
explanationContent.grammarFocus: Conjugate (you / mention) to match the subject and the time clues in the sentence.

items.sentence: ...... (live) abroad for five years, she returned home with a much broader view of the world.

wrongOptions.live: The bare infinitive (live) is not conjugated — adjust tense and person to fit the sentence.

items.sentence: Maria told me ...... (she / attend) the workshop several times that year already, so she felt quite confident.
